configureVds.description:
Specifies if vSphere Distributed Switch (VDS) should be configured for the hypervisor cluster
being added.

hypervisorClusterName.description: Name of the hypervisor cluster to be added.

vsphereDatacenterName.description: vSphere datacenter name where this hypervisor cluster is to be added.

AssociatedDS.description: Associated datastore with VM provisioning policy

resourceUri.description: The URI reference for this resource.

datastoreCount.description: Total Datastore Count of the system

hypervisorClusterCount.description: Total Hypervisor Cluster Count of the system

serversCount.description: Total Servers Count of the system

storageArrayCount.description: Total Storage Array Count of the system

switchesCount.description: Total Switches Count of the system

vmCount.description: Total Virtual Machine Count of the system

AssociatedVM.description: Associated VM with VM provisioning policy

AvailableSoftwareCatalog.description: Software Catalog with detailed versions of the HPE Storage Software, hypervisor software, HPE Storage Connection Manager and Firmware

isLatest.description: Boolean flag indicating whether this is the latest version available for software update.

hypervisorClusterId.description: Unique Identifier of the Hypervisor Cluster, usually a UUID.

systemId.description: Unique Identifier of the system, usually a UUID.

count.description: Number of items in this response.

offset.description: The offset query parameter from the request.

total.description: Total number of items matching the filter parameter in the request.

CommonResourceProperties.description: Common properties included in all resource models.

generation.description: A monotonically increasing value. This value updates when the resource is updated and can be used as a short way to determine if a resource has changed or which of two different copies of a resource is more up to date.

id.description: An identifier for the resource, usually a UUID.

name.description: A system specified name for the resource.

resourceUri.description: The self reference for this resource.

CommonSoftwareCatalogProperties.description: Version of the software catalog and its constituent software components.

hypervisorManager.description: Details of the hypervisor manager software.

releaseDate.description: Release date of the software catalog

serverFirmware.description: Details of the HPE Server Firmware.

storageConnectionManager.description: Details of the HPE Storage Connection Manager software.

storageSoftware.description: Details of the HPE Storage software.

ConfigAnalyserResults.description: Results of config analysis rules execution

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the config analysis rules execution result is created

createdBy.description: Source type of config analysis rules execution

nextScheduledRunAt.description: Timestamp when the config analysis rules execution is next scheduled

results.description: Execution results data in json format

runStartedAt.description: Timestamp when the config analysis rules execution is started

runType.description: run type of config analysis rules execution (Manual/Scheduled)

totalFailed.description: Number of failed rules in config analysis execution

totalPassed.description: Number of rules passed in config analysis execution

totalWarning.description: Number of warnings in config analysis execution

ConfigAnalysisStatus.description: Status of last run of configuration analysis job.

createdAt.description: Time when configuration analysis job was created.

createdBy.description: Configuration analysis job was created by.

nextScheduledRunTime.description: Time when configuration analysis job was next scheduled.

ruleRunStartTime.description: Time when configuration analysis job was started.

CurrentSoftwareCatalog.description: Software Catalog with detailed versions of various software components like HPE Storage Software, hypervisor software, HPE Storage Connection Manager and Server firmware. If the version of this catalog is set to 'Unavailable', it means one or more software component versions are not available. If the version of this catalog is set to 'Non-Compliant', it means the current set of software component versions does not match any of the supported software catalog versions.

reasons.description: Reasons if any as to why the current software catalog version cannot be determined

provider.description: Library that provides the ability to encrypt sensitive data.

scope.description: Enables one to manage encryption at the level of an individual blob or container.

debugId.description: A unique identifier for the request

errorCode.description: A machine friendly identifier for the error response

httpStatusCode.description: The HTTP status code of the response

systemId.description: An identifier for the System, usually a UUID.

HealthComponentStatus.description: Resource Component Health Status. Indicated as ENUM with following mapping

HypervisorCluster.description: Hypervisor Cluster Information of the system.

hypervisorManagerId.description: Unique Identifier of Hypervisor Cluster Manager.

id.description: Unique Identifier of the Hypervisor Cluster, usually a UUID.

resourceUri.description: Resource URI of the Hypervisor Cluster.

HypervisorClusterSoftwareInfo.description: Hypervisor cluster with details of each software component.

availableSoftwareCatalogs.description: List of software catalogs available for update on the hypervisor cluster.

currentSoftwareCatalog.description: Current Software Catalog with detailed information about all the software components.

lastPrecheckRunOn.description: Date on which the last software precheck was run.

lastPrecheckRunVersion.description: Version of the software catalog to which last software precheck was run.

lastUpdatedOn.description: Date on which the last software update was performed on this hypervisor cluster.

unavailableSoftwareCatalogs.description: List of software catalogs that are unavailable for update on the hypervisor cluster.

HypervisorHost.description: id, URI to reference the hypervisor host.

id.description: Hypervisor Host details of the Server.

name.description: Hypervisor Host Name of the Server.

PatchSystemRequest.description: Request parameter for patch operation on the system.

location.description: Location details to be updated on the system

id.description: An identifier for the performance policy.

PrecheckRequest.description: Request parameters for software update prechecks operation on the system.

catalogVersion.description: Version of the target software catalog for the software precheck/update request.

hypervisorClusterIds.description: List of Unique Identifiers (usually UUIDs) of Hypervisor Clusters in the system for which software update prechecks operation is to be initiated. If omitted, software update prechecks operation will be initiated on all Hypervisor Clusters available in the system.

description.description: The description of the vm provisioning policy.

effectiveFromDateTime.description: Time in UTC at which the protection policy assignment will be effective from.

id.description: An identifier for the protection policy.

backupGranularity.description: Applicable only to backup copies. Specifies granularity at which the backup is created. The user can specify whether to create volume based backups or application Change Block Tracking (CBT) based backups.

consistency.description: Specifies whether to create crash consistent or application consistent snapshot. CRASH_CONSISTENT_ON_FAILURE: If an application consistent snapshot fails for any reason, with this option it will then take a crash consistent snapshot and continue.

perfIopsLimit.description: IOPS limit for this volume. If limit_iops is not specified when a volume is created, or if limit_iops is set to -1, then the volume has no IOPS limit. If limit_iops is not specified while creating a clone, IOPS limit of parent volume will be used as limit. IOPS limit should be in range [256, 4294967294] or -1 for unlimited. If both limit_iops and limit_mbps are specified, limit_mbps must not be hit before limit_iops. In other words, IOPS and MBPS limits should honor limit_iops <= ((limit_mbps MB/s * 2^20 B/MB) / block_size B). Signed 64-bit integer.

perfMbpsLimit.description: Throughput limit for this volume in MB/s. If limit_mbps is not specified when a volume is created, or if limit_mbps is set to -1, then the volume has no MBPS limit. MBPS limit should be in range [1, 4294967294] or -1 for unlimited. If both limit_iops and limit_mbps are specified, limit_mbps must not be hit before limit_iops. In other words, IOPS and MBPS limits should honor limit_iops <= ((limit_mbps MB/s * 2^20 B/MB) / block_size B). Signed 64-bit integer.

RedundancyComponentStatus.description: Resource Component Redundancy Status. Indicated as ENUM with following mapping

ServerInfo.description: Details of the Server with select information.

iloFirmwareVersion.description: firmware version of iLO in the server.

iloState.description: state of the iLO in the server.

iloStatus.description: status of the iLO in the server.

maintenanceMode.description: Is the server in maintenance mode?

ncmVersion.description: Version of NCM installed on the server.

processorCount.description: Number of processors in the server.

processorModel.description: Model of the processors in the server.

systemId.description: Unique Identifier of the system, usually a UUID.

SoftwareCatalog.description: System Software Catalog with all the detailed information of software components, end user license agreement and a list of systems that have an update path to the catalog.

eula.description: End User License Agreement for this software catalog

systemsWithUpdatePath.description: List of systems having update path to this software catalog

name.description: Specific name of the software component

releaseDate.description: Release date of the software component

releaseNotesUrl.description: Uniform Resource Locator (URL) of Release Notes for the version of software component

version.description: Version number of the software component

StorageProfileClusterBasic.description: Storage profile with associated cluster details.

associatedDatastores.description: datastores that the VM provisioning policy should be associated with.

associatedVms.description: Objects that the VM provisioning policy should be associated with.

storageProfileId.description: An identifier for the storage profile.

compressionRatio.description: Compression ratio of the storage system.

dedupeRatio.description: Deduplication ratio of the storage system.

groupLeaderName.description: Name of the storage system array group leader.

groupLeaderSerialNumber.description: Serial number of the storage system array group leader.

groupName.description: Name of the storage system array group.

groupState.description: State of the storage system array group.

id.description: Storage system array Identifier, usually a UUID.

name.description: Name of the Storage system Array

resourceUri.description: Resource URI of the Storage system Array

cpuCapacityMhz.description: CPU Capacity in Mhz of system

cpuUsedMhz.description: CPU Usage in Mhz by system

memoryCapacityBytes.description: Memory Capacity in Bytes of system

memoryUsedBytes.description: Memory Usage in Bytes by system

SystemForUpdate.description: System id and Name with a list of hypervisor clusters

SystemHealth.description:
Aspects of system health.

Deduced health of storage subsystem based on associated arrays, controllers, disks,
shelves, power supply, network interfaces, fan and temperature sensors.

Aggregated health of servers based on health statuses of multiple servers in the system.

Aggregated health of network based on health statues of multiple switches used in the system.

Deduced/Aggregated overall health of the system based on storage, servers and networking health.

SystemInfo.description: Details of the system with select information.

hypervisorClusters.description: List of hypervisor clusters in the system with their software details.
List of hypervisor clusters in the system with their software details.

lastUpdatedOn.description: Date on which the last software update was performed on this system.

precheckValidUntil.description: If a software update precheck is completed recently, time until which that precheck is valid for software update to be initiated.

systemVms.description: List of system virtual machine information.

latitude.description: Latitude coordinate of the system location

longitude.description: Longitude coordinate of the system location

SystemVm.description: System Virtual Machines Information.  These are not workload virtual machines. These virtual machines are part of the system itself - e.g. the Omnicube virtual machines in a system with stackType SIMPLIVITY.

name.description: Name of the system Virtual Machine.

uuid.description: Unique Identifier of the system virtual machine, usually a UUID.

UnavailableSoftwareCatalog.description: Software Catalog with detailed versions of the HPE Storage Software, hypervisor software, HPE Storage Connection Manager and Firmware

reasons.description: Reasons why this catalog is unavailable for update

UpdateRequest.description: Request parameters for software update operation on the system.

catalogVersion.description: Version of the target software catalog for the software precheck/update request.

hypervisorClusterIds.description: List of Unique Identifiers (usually UUIDs) of Hypervisor Clusters in the system for which software update operation is to be initiated. If omitted, software update operation will be initiated on all Hypervisor Clusters available in the system.

UpdateStatus.description: Details of the current software update status

catalogVersion.description: Software Catalog version to which the update operation is in progress, if any.

parentTaskUri.description: Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) of the parent software update task (asynchronous operation).

percentage.description: Percentage of the software update progress.

state.description:
Status of the software update:
  * `UP_TO_DATE` - Already up to date
  * `UPDATE_AVAILABLE` - One or more updates are available
  * `PENDING` - Waiting for update operation (precheck or update) to begin
  * `PRECHECK_IN_PROGRESS` - A software update precheck operation is in progress
  * `PRECHECK_FAILED` - The previous software update precheck operation has failed
  * `PRECHECK_COMPLETE` - The previous software update precheck operation has completed successfully
  * `UPDATE_IN_PROGRESS` - A software update operation is in progress
  * `UPDATE_COMPLETE` - The previous software update operation has completed successfully
  * `UPDATE_FAILED` - The previous software update operation has failed
  * `NOT_READY` - Not ready for update (e.g. when current version is not available, so no update paths exist)

taskUri.description: Uniform Resource Identifier (URI) of the software update task (asynchronous operation).

offset.description: The number of items to skip before starting to collect the result set

total.description: Total number of documents matching filter criteria.

VMProvisioningPolicy.description: Represents a Virtual Machine Provisioning Policy

associatedObjects.description: Objects that the VM provisioning policy should be associated with.

description.description: A brief description of the VM provisioning policy.

id.description: UUID string uniquely identifying the VM provisioning policy.

name.description: A user friendly name to identify the VM provisioning policy.

VMProvisioningPolicyCreate.description: Input to create a VM provisioning policy.

VMProvisioningPolicyEdit.description: Input to edit a VM provisioning policy.

allFlash.description: This indicates whether all flash is enabled or not.

dataReduction.description: Specifies if data reduction capability is enabled. Data reduction is a combination of both deduplication and compression.

deduplication.description: Specifies if dedupe is enabled for volumes created. Deduplication is a process that eliminates excessive copies of data and significantly decreases storage capacity requirements.

snapshotAllocWarning.description: Sets a snapshot space allocation limit. The snapshot space of the virtual volume is prevented from growing beyond the indicated percentage of the virtual volume size. A warning alert is generated when the reserved snapshot space of the virtual volume exceeds the indicated percentage of the virtual volume size.

userAllocWarning.description: Sets a user space allocation limit. The user space of the TPVV(thin provisioned virtual volume) is prevented from growing beyond the indicated percentage of the virtual volume size. A warning alert is generated when the user data space of the TPVV exceeds the specified percentage of the virtual volume size.

bearer.description:
The HPE GreenLake for Private Cloud Business Edition Cloud Console API uses a JWT bearer token for authentication.
An authentication token can be obtained from the HPE GreenLake console.

info.description: HPE GreenLake for Private Cloud Business Edition System APIs
info.title: HPE GreenLake for Private Cloud Business Edition System APIs

get.description:
Returns the list of latest config analysis reports for all systems.
It also accepts 'filter' query parameter where if 'systemId' is provided as 'filter',
it returns the latest config analysis report for that system.

parameters.description: Filter criteria - e.g. systemId eq c0930136-5317-5647-8d92-87ca3984c5f9
parameters.name: filter

parameters.description:
The resource property to sort by followed by the response order.
Response order can be either “asc” (ascending) or “desc” (descending)
parameters.name: sort

get.summary: Returns a list of config analysis rules execution results.

post.description:
Initiates execution of config analysis rules execution for the System
specified by 'systemId' in request body

schema.description: Asynchronous operation URI. Use this to track the progress of the asynchronous operation.

get.description:
Returns config analysis rules execution report identified by 'reportId'
parameter.

parameters.description: Unique identifier of a Config Analysis Report.
parameters.name: reportId

schema.description: An identifier for the config analysis report, usually a UUID.

get.summary: Returns a config analysis rules execution results for the provided reportId.

get.description:
Returns a list of all system software catalogs.
Use 'select' and 'filter' query parameters to customize the response returned by this API.
For example, to get the End User License Agreement (EULA) for catalog version 1.2.3.4, use '?select=eula&filter=version eq 1.2.3.4'. 
To get recommended systems for precheck to a given catalog version, use '?select=systemsWithUpdatePath&filter=version eq 1.2.3.4'.

parameters.description: A list of properties in the items collection to include in the response.
parameters.name: select

parameters.description:
The expression to filter responses.
The property names which are of type string should be passed in quotes('') and nested property names should be passed with "/" as the separator.
Filtering is supported with following properties:
 * eula
 * createdAt
 * customerId
 * generation
 * id
 * name
 * resourceUri
 * type
 * updatedAt
 * hypervisor/name
 * hypervisor/releaseDate
 * hypervisor/releaseNotesUrl
 * hypervisor/version
 * releaseDate
 * serverFirmware/name
 * serverFirmware/releaseDate
 * serverFirmware/releaseNotesUrl
 * serverFirmware/version
 * storageConnectionManager/name
 * storageConnectionManager/releaseDate
 * storageConnectionManager/releaseNotesUrl
 * storageConnectionManager/version
 * storageSoftware/name
 * storageSoftware/releaseDate
 * storageSoftware/releaseNotesUrl
 * storageSoftware/version
 * version
parameters.name: filter

parameters.description: Use limit in conjunction with offset for paging, e.g.: offset=30&&limit=10. Limit is the maximum number of items to include in the response.
parameters.name: limit

401.description: The current user is not authorized to perform the requested operation.

get.description:
Returns the system software catalog for the specified id.
Includes versions of the catalog and all constituent software components along with the End User License Agreement
and a list of systems with update path to the corresponding catalog version.

parameters.description: A list of properties in the items collection to include in the response.
parameters.name: select

401.description: The current user is not authorized to perform the requested operation.

get.summary: Get the System Software Catalog with specified id.

get.description:
Returns the systems and their properties defined by the query parameters. Retrieving all of the properties for 
the system can take a long time because the amount of data is large. Use the ‘select’ query parameter to choose 
only the properties you want to retrieve for a system. For example, to get details of the id, name and software 
information for each system, use ‘?select=id,name,softwareInfo’

parameters.description:
Query parameter listing the properties of system information to fetch.
Although Hypervisor Clusters collection (property hypervisorClusters) can be selected, selecting elements of the collection is not supported.
Similarly, hypervisor clusters update status collection (property softwareInfo.hypervisorClusters) can be selected, but, selecting elements of the collection is not supported in the select query parameter.
Although systemVms collection can be selected, selecting elements of the collection is not supported.
parameters.name: select

parameters.description: Use offset in conjunction with limit for paging, e.g.: offset=30&&limit=10. Offset is the number of items from the beginning of the result set to the first item included in the response.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Use limit in conjunction with offset for paging, e.g.: offset=30&&limit=10. Limit is the maximum number of items to include in the response.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description:
The expression to filter responses.
This API doesn't support filtering based on hypervisorClusters collection property, softwareInfo.hypervisorClusters and systemVms collection property.
Request with filter based on the above mentioned properties will be treated as a Bad Request with 400 Error.
parameters.name: filter

parameters.description:
A comma separated list of properties to sort by, followed by a direction
indicator ("asc" or "desc"). If no direction indicator is specified the
default order is ascending.
This API doesn't support sorting based on hypervisorClusters collection property, softwareInfo.hypervisorClusters collection property and systemVms collection property.
Request with sort based on the above mentioned properties will be treated as a Bad Request with 400 Error.
parameters.name: sort

401.description: The current user is not authorized to perform the requested operation.

get.summary: Get information about all systems subject to query parameters.

get.description:
Returns the system properties specified in the query parameters. 
Retrieving all of the properties for the system can take a long time because the 
amount of data is large. Use the  'select' query parameter to choose only the properties you want to retrieve.

For example, to get details of the system's id, name and software information, use '?select=id,name,softwareInfo'

parameters.description: Unique Identifier of the system, usually a UUID.
parameters.name: id

parameters.description:
Query parameter listing the properties of system information to fetch.
Although Hypervisor Clusters collection (property hypervisorClusters) can be selected, selecting elements of the collection is not supported.
Similarly, hypervisor clusters update status collection (property softwareInfo.hypervisorClusters) can be selected, but, selecting elements of the collection is not supported in the select query parameter.
parameters.name: select

401.description: The current user is not authorized to perform the requested operation.

get.summary: Get information about the specified system subject to query parameters.

parameters.description: Unique Identifier of the system, usually a UUID.
parameters.name: id

401.description: The current user is not authorized to perform the requested operation.

403.description: Requested operation is forbidden in the current state of System.

patch.summary: Modifies the system specified by systemId.

post.description:
Adds the specified hypervisor cluster to the specified system. The user must have permissions to update this system. 
Returns a task identifier to be used by clients to track the progress of the operation.

parameters.description: Unique Identifier of the system, usually a UUID.
parameters.name: id

202.description: Add Hypervisor Cluster request is accepted.

schema.description: Asynchronous operation URI. Use this to track the progress of the asynchronous operation.

401.description: The current user is not authorized to perform the requested operation.

403.description: Requested operation is forbidden in the current state of system.

409.description: A software precheck or update operation is already in progress.

post.summary: Initiates addition of a hypervisor cluster to system with the given id.

get.description:
Get server information by system id 

Returns details about the servers for the specified system id. Retrieving all of the properties for all servers 
in a system can take a long time because the amount of data is large. Use the  'select' query parameter to choose 
only the properties you want to retrieve.

For example, to get the server id, name, serial number and hypervisor host, use ?select=id,name,serialNumber,hypervisorHost

parameters.description: Unique Identifier of the system, usually a UUID.
parameters.name: id

parameters.description: Query parameter listing the properties of Server information to fetch.
parameters.name: select

parameters.description: Use offset in conjunction with limit for paging, e.g.: offset=30&&limit=10. Offset is the number of items from the beginning of the result set to the first item included in the response.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Use limit in conjunction with offset for paging, e.g.: offset=30&&limit=10. Limit is the maximum number of items to include in the response.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: The expression to filter responses.
parameters.name: filter

parameters.description:
A comma separated list of properties to sort by, followed by a direction
indicator ("asc" or "desc"). If no direction indicator is specified the
default order is ascending.
parameters.name: sort

401.description: The current user is not authorized to perform the requested operation.

get.summary: Get information about the specified system's servers.

post.description:
Initiate a set of software update prechecks on the specified system and hypervisor clusters in it using the specified software catalog version.
This operation validates whether the software on system and its hypervisor clusters are ready to be updated to the target software catalog version.

parameters.description: Unique Identifier of the System, usually a UUID.
parameters.name: id

schema.description: Asynchronous operation URI. Use this to track the progress of the asynchronous operation.

401.description: The current user is not authorized to perform the requested operation.

403.description: Requested operation is forbidden in the current state of System.

409.description: A software precheck or update operation is already in progress.

post.summary: Initiate software update prechecks on the given System.

post.description:
Initiate a software update on the specified system and the hypervisor clusters in it using the specified software catalog version.
Before invoking this API, ensure that software update prechecks on the same parameters successfully completed and is valid.

parameters.description: Unique Identifier of the System, usually a UUID.
parameters.name: id

schema.description: Asynchronous operation URI. Use this to track the progress of the asynchronous operation.

401.description: The current user is not authorized to perform the requested operation.

403.description: Requested operation is forbidden in the current state of System.

409.description: A software precheck or update operation is already in progress.

post.summary: Initiate software update on the given System.

post.description:
Resume the failed and paused software update on the specified system.
Invoke this API only after fixing the problems reported in software update.

parameters.description: Unique Identifier of the System, usually a UUID.
parameters.name: id

202.description: Software update resume request is accepted.

schema.description: Asynchronous operation URI. Use this to track the progress of the asynchronous operation.

401.description: The current user is not authorized to perform the requested operation.

403.description: Requested operation is forbidden in the current state of system.

404.description: No failed and paused software update is found to resume.

409.description: A software precheck or update operation is already in progress.

post.summary: Resume the failed and paused software update on the selected System.

post.description:
Refresh the software catalogs and software versions on the specified system.
The current and available software catalog versions are recomputed based on the component versions running on the system and software catalogs available for update.

parameters.description: Unique Identifier of the system, usually a UUID.
parameters.name: id

202.description: Software version refresh request is accepted.

schema.description: Asynchronous operation URI. Use this to track the progress of the asynchronous operation.

401.description: The current user is not authorized to perform the requested operation.

403.description: Requested operation is forbidden in the current state of system.

409.description: Cannot perform software version refresh as a software precheck or update operation is in progress.

post.summary: Refresh the Software Catalog versions available for the system identified by id.

get.description:
Get server details by system id and server id 

Returns information about a specific server on a specific system. Retrieving all of the properties for a server 
can take a long time because the amount of data is large. Use the select query parameter to choose only the 
properties you want to retrieve. 

For example, to get details of the server's id, name, serial number and hypervisor host, use ?select=id,name,serialNumber,hypervisorHost

parameters.description: Unique Identifier of the system, usually a UUID.
parameters.name: systemId

parameters.description: Unique Identifier of the Server, usually a UUID.
parameters.name: serverId

parameters.description: Query parameter listing the properties of Server information to fetch.
parameters.name: select

401.description: The current user is not authorized to perform the requested operation.

get.summary: Get information about a system's specific server.

get.description:
Returns a list of VM provisioning policies according to the given query
parameters for paging, filtering, and sorting.

parameters.description:
The number of items to omit from the beginning of the result set.
Use offset in conjunction with limit for pagination. 
For example,  "offset=30&limit=10" indicates the fourth page of 10 items.
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description:
The maximum number of items to include in the response.
Use offset in conjunction with limit for pagination. 
For example, "offset=30&limit=10" indicates the fourth page of 10 items.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description:
An expression to filter the results.
Filtering is supported with following attributes:
 * name
 * id 
 * timestamp
 * clusterid
 * deduplication
 * allFlash
 * encryption.cipher
 * associatedvmid
 * associatedvmname
parameters.name: filter

parameters.description:
A comma separated list of properties to sort by, followed by a direction
indicator ("asc" or "desc").
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: A list of properties to include in the response.
parameters.name: select
